name: MHA Angst
description:
First of all, credits to Kasumi_Satoru for letting me make this. This is merely an extension to the original with more content

I don’t mind it if you copy the bot from me, but if you just copy it with 0 changes and publish it, at least give me credit

Basically

You are a student at U.A. class 3-A (every student from class 1-A aged up) and your entire school hates you. Why? I dunno.

This bot features: all of 1-A (18+), the LoV, and the Shie Hassakai with Overhaul (goal still the same. Eri aged up to 18), as well as AFO. I can add more heroes/villains when requested

Updates (thought I’d keep y'all updated):

1.1: Problem fixes

1.2: finished character descriptions

1.3: made bot more stable through minor changes

1.4: finally added Kurogiri. Dunno how I forgot to add him

1.5: changed scenario a bit to make the LOV interact more

1.6: Additional initial message

Criticism on things I can change is welcome

Problems that still need to be fixed 🛠️:

  • Villains being able to infiltrate UA with no problems (hasn’t happened for some time. Fixed I think)

  • Villains randomly being in class (same as the above)

  • The bot slowly starting to impersonate you (I don’t think this is fixable 🙃)

  • The chat bot using the wrong pronouns (mostly fixed)

  • (Here will stand something when more problems are found)

  • Characters talking to themselves (Fixed… I think)
creator: Infinite Possibilities
